base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of battle_ui — a ui (menu_screen) from 1996 pokemon red blue. Battle interface — Fight/Bag/Pokemon/Run menu + HP bars + type-matchup + experience bars. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Battle interface — Fight/Bag/Pokemon/Run menu + HP bars + type-matchup + experience bars
